arts.ttl: Aston Villa's next five Premier League fixtures compared to Man Utd, Newcastle and Tottenham
arts.sum: Villa then head to St. James' Park on Boxing Day next Thursday before hosting Brighton and then Leicester City the following week. Aston Villa responded to going five league games without a victory with two wins in the space of a few days against Brentford and Southampton, but then fell to a sixth league defeat against Nottingham Forest last time out.
